definitions.text: A small quantity of liquid, just large enough to hold its own rounded shape through surface tension, especially one that falls from a source of liquid.
examples: Put three drops of oil into the mixture.

definitions.text: A dose of liquid medicine in the form of a drop (sense 1).
A liquid medicine that is intended to be administered in drops (sense 1).
Of a liquid: to fall in drops or droplets. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
To fall (straight down) under the influence of gravity, like a drop of liquid.
examples: A single shot was fired and the bird dropped from the sky.
When you defeat this boss, there's a chance a power-up will drop.

definitions.text: Of an item: To appear for the player to pick up, usually after an enemy has been defeated.
examples: When you defeat this boss, there's a chance a power-up will drop.
This item can sometimes drop from chests.
